prevalence.source: Pediatric respiratory surveillance; RSV season reports

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate in infants due to hospitalization risk

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of wheeze and respiratory distress; viral testing in hospital settings
